overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City. The scene features a bustling urban downtown with elevated highways, futuristic vehicles, and towering corporate buildings bathed in warm morning sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk and elevated highway

events.description: moving from asphalt crosswalk onto concrete sidewalk
turning left to align with sidewalk direction

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in a purple shirt along the city sidewalk

futuristic black sedan driving along the street

entered.detail: large curved metallic overpass with support pillars
large digital billboard displaying a monochrome face advertisement
structural support pillar with illuminated 01 signage

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a city crosswalk with the camera following a pedestrian in a purple shirt. The scene transitions from the asphalt crosswalk onto a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway structure. Futuristic vehicles drive along the multi-lane road to the right while the camera maintains a steady walking pace behind the pedestrian.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk beneath elevated highway with corporate buildings

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk following the pedestrian in purple at a steady pace

notable_agents.action: person in purple shirt walking steadily ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall dark corporate building with Militech logo visible on facade
safety railing with orange paint along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking along the concrete sidewalk beneath the elevated highway. The Militech corporate building becomes visible on the left side in the distance, while an orange safety railing runs along the sidewalk edge. The pedestrian in purple continues walking ahead as futuristic vehicles pass by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: parking bay entrance under highway overpass

camera returns to forward facing direction to continue along sidewalk

agents.ego_description: pausing to look at the parking area with various futuristic vehicles before continuing forward

notable_agents.action: large black SUV parked in the yellow grid zone

entered.detail: modern glass building with illuminated cyan Night City signage
yellow grid marked parking area containing several futuristic cars

segments.scene_description: Approaching a parking bay under the overpass, the camera pans right to observe the yellow-grid parking area filled with futuristic vehicles. The Night City building with its illuminated signage becomes prominent on the right. After a brief observation, the camera returns to its forward-facing position to continue down the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown sidewalk with street parking and billboards

events.description: pedestrian in red outfit crosses the path from right to left

agents.ego_description: resuming walk along the busy sidewalk, passing other pedestrians and observing street traffic

notable_agents.action: person in red outfit and white cap walking past the camera
green sports car driving along the multi-lane street

entered.detail: large yellow advertisement billboard for Jet Sail with purple text
tall street lamps with orange glowing lights along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera continues down the busy downtown sidewalk, passing a large yellow Jet Sail billboard on the left. A pedestrian in red crosses the path from right to left while various futuristic vehicles drive along the street. The elevated highway structure remains overhead as the walk continues through the bustling urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown street approaching distant intersection with corporate buildings

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk with the Militech building visible again on the left side

notable_agents.action: person in green shirt and shorts walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: elevated roadway structure spanning across the street in the distance

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the camera continues walking along the sidewalk with the Militech building now closer on the left. A pedestrian in a green shirt walks ahead in the same direction. The street extends toward a distant overpass bridge while traffic continues to flow along the multi-lane road to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling downtown corridor that transitions from a shaded underpass toward a wide, sunlit corporate district. It begins at a city crosswalk, following a pedestrian in a purple shirt as the path shifts from asphalt onto a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway. As the camera progresses, the Militech corporate building emerges in the distance to the left while the view briefly pans right to observe a yellow-grid parking bay filled with futuristic vehicles and illuminated signage. The scene then opens up as the camera passes a large yellow Jet Sail billboard and a pedestrian in red, maintaining its forward momentum under the overhead highway structure. Finally, the walk continues past a pedestrian in a green shirt, bringing the Militech building into closer view as the street extends toward a distant overpass bridge.
